description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a casual urban outfit, featuring a collared shirt with rolled-up sleeves and a pair of straight-cut trousers. The shirt appears to be buttoned and is tucked into the pants, giving a neat and tidy appearance. The figure's hands are relaxed and open at the sides, and the posture is upright, suggesting a neutral or waiting stance. The shoes are sturdy and practical, suitable for walking on city streets or sidewalks. The head is not visible in the provided views, but the overall build is average and proportionate. The clothing style and fit are typical for an adult male pedestrian in an urban environment.
description: An adult male pedestrian in a collared shirt and straight-cut trousers, standing upright with relaxed hands. The outfit is casual and suitable for city streets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the collared shirt tucked into straight trousers, with both hands visible and relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the shirt and trousers, with the left hand and shoe clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt and trousers, with both legs and shoes visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right profile of the figure, with the right hand and shoe in clear view.
attribute_clothing_type: collared button-up shirt with rolled sleeves and straight-cut trousers
